gold.title: Switch
gold.reason: 71 downloads — context-driven segmented switch (tab-style toggle group) with size variants (small/medium/large) and shared context state. Elevates pricing toggles and view-mode switchers on marketing/SaaS pages.

gold.title: Tooltip
gold.reason: 58 downloads — multi-type tooltip (success/warning/error/violet/default) with directional positioning, delay, and box alignment options via react-tooltip. Immediately deployable with real design vocabulary.

gold.title: Tooltip Icon Button
gold.reason: 30 downloads, 1 like — a compound TooltipIconButton combining shadcn Button + Tooltip with configurable side placement, forwarded refs, and full prop passthrough — the kind of polished UI primitive that professional component libraries ship.

silver.title: Tooltip
silver.reason: 23 downloads — @visx/tooltip with bounds-aware positioning, custom styles, and a position indicator dot. Useful for data-viz contexts but heavyweight for standard UI use.

silver.title: Tooltip [react-aria-components]
silver.reason: 26 downloads, 2 likes — accessible react-aria tooltip with compose render props and animate-in/out transitions. Solid accessibility story but visually equivalent to shadcn baseline.

silver.title: Content Tooltip
silver.reason: Rich content tooltip demo with icon header, structured layout inside the popover — demonstrates a useful pattern for help/info popovers on SaaS dashboards.

silver.title: Context Card
silver.reason: 15 downloads — react-tooltip-based context card with rich ReactNode content and directional support. The randomly-generated ID approach is a minor concern but the pattern is useful.

silver.title: Tooltip
silver.reason: 17 downloads — CVA variant-aware tooltip with Radix primitive, data-slot attributes, and side offset control. Well-structured utility component.

bronze.title: Tooltip
bronze.reason: 549 downloads but is a direct shadcn/ui primitive re-export with zero customisation. Included as a dependency by other components; not a standalone showcase piece.

bronze.title: Tooltip 1
bronze.reason: 2 downloads — @base-ui-components/react tooltip with default gray styling. Library-specific wrapper with no design differentiation.

bronze.title: Error Tooltip
bronze.reason: 3 downloads — wraps shadcn Tooltip with a single destructive color class override. Too minimal to merit standalone component status.
